events.title: Magnitude 7.3 earthquake quake strikes off Mexico coast
events.summary: The US Tsunami Warning Center has recorded waves 0.3m (1.1 feet) high in Puerto Madero and Chiapas in Mexico after the quake.

events.title: Uganda suspends school trips after 20 pupils die in bus crash
events.summary: Thousands are killed on Uganda's roads each year but this is one of its deadliest accidents involving children.

events.title: Second tanker in three months hijacked off Yemen by suspected Somali pirates
events.summary: There have also been several unsuccessful attacks in a region where piracy appears to be making a comeback.

events.title: Colombian national killed by ICE agent during operation in Maine
events.summary: It comes less than a week after an undocumented migrant was fatally shot in Houston by an immigration agent.

events.title: Bodycam footage shows airlift of girl stranded by Texas floods
events.summary: Footage shows a rescuer reaching a family of three stranded by floods that destroyed their house in Uvalde county.

events.title: At least two dead in Texas floods ravaging same area where campers died
events.summary: The same area devastated by floods last year's floods, which caused more than 130 deaths, is once again being hit.

events.title: Air India crash report likely to be ready in October, say investigators
events.summary: The crash killed 260 people, including 241 on board, with only one passenger surviving.

events.title: Indian activist urged to end hunger strike as he loses 9.1kg in 19 days
events.summary: The environmental activist has been on a hunger strike for 19 days and has visibly weakened.

events.title: Flash flood kills 4, leaves 4 others missing in Vietnam

events.title: British couple return to village at heart of deadly Spanish wildfire
events.summary: At least 13 people, including five believed to be Britons, were killed by Thursday's wildfire in Spain's Almeria province.

events.title: Italian officials handed jail terms for Genoa bridge disaster that killed 43

events.title: Watch: What to know as Genoa bridge disaster trial ends

events.title: As heatwaves strike, Europeans turn to Chinese air-conditioners
events.summary: Chinese brands are meeting surging air-conditioner demand in Europe, a region with typically low ownership rates.

events.title: Russian online retail warehouses hit by deadly Ukrainian strikes

events.title: US and Iran trade attacks as Khamenei is buried

events.title: Iran must pledge to stop shooting at ships in Strait of Hormuz, US officials say

events.title: US insists Strait of Hormuz is open as it exchanges strikes with Iran

events.title: US and Iran trade fire as tensions rise over Strait of Hormuz

events.title: UAE condemns Iran's 'brazen' attack on tankers as US launches fresh strikes

events.title: Israeli strike on police post in north Gaza kills seven, officials say

events.summary: US President Donald Trump says he is yet to decide whether or not he will "finish off" Iran.

events.summary: There have also been several unsuccessful attacks in a region where piracy appears to be making a comeback.

events.title: Orange haze from Canada wildfires seen in Ontario and northern US

events.title: Cuban dissident Luis Manuel Otero Alcántara goes into exile in US

events.title: Five arrested after Hong Kong police raid independent bookshops

events.summary: Malcolm Timbrell's wife and their friends are thought to have died when a devastating wildfire tore through their village in Spain.

events.title: Volunteer firefighter suspected of starting devastating France forest fire

events.title: Zelensky's removal of popular defence minister sparks protests in Ukraine

events.title: Helicopters dump water as huge Norway fire destroys homes

events.title: Why some African nations are turning down Trump aid money

events.title: Fears of a massacre in this city on the front line of Sudan's war

events.title: Wanyonyi breaks 1,000m world record on debut in Monaco

events.title: How a fake presidential council ended up with a budget of almost $1m in Nigeria

events.title: South Africa World Cup midfielder Adams dies aged 25

events.title: Venezuela government to launch formal talks with opposition members

events.title: Is Trump facing a popular backlash on immigration?

events.title: How Indian scientists are mapping the brain's last frontier

events.title: More people around the world now favour China over the US, Pew study suggests
events.summary: There is more confidence in Xi Jinping than Donald Trump, the US think tank's survey indicates.

events.title: 'I must get out into the free world', dissident who fled China on boat tells BBC

events.title: Crackdown on 'objectionable' books in Indian-administered Kashmir sparks row
events.summary: Authorities in Indian-administered Kashmir have asked educational institutions to review every book on their premises.

events.title: More than 500 Rohingya vanished at sea - what happened?

events.title: Australia's next football world cup is on home soil between seniors

events.title: 'It's not right': Dragons fume after pushing Warriors

events.title: Australia's Herbert makes miracle shot but falls to fourth at The Open
events.summary: Australia's Lucas Herbert makes one of the shots of The Open, but loses his day two lead to fall to fourth.

events.title: Should NZ follow Australia's lead and increase fuel reserves? AA says no
events.summary: New Zealand has about a month's supply of petrol and jet fuel. A new bulk reserve of fuel is soon to arrive in Australia - should New Zealand do the same to protect access here?

events.title: Live: Cowboys launch fightback against Dolphins, Manly confirms injury to Trbojevic

events.title: Brondello suspended by WNBA for inappropriate comment
